completion_summary: Added the operation-level LiveLLMAgent for the official runner; one model decision per operation; public spectra and bounded campaign memory; paired assigned/masked spectrum conditions; structured public audit; cumulative token/cost/retry accounting; fail-closed redacted provider errors retained as invalid operations; no harness repair or closeout. Four fake-client end-to-end tests and broader interaction/method tests pass. No live provider-performance claim without credentials.
notes: No live provider call in this claim; fake-client tests prove runner/resource/replay semantics. No harness closeout or private chain-of-thought.
scope: Integrate an operation-level live LLM into the official runner with public spectra and campaign memory, fail-closed model errors, structured audits, and cumulative provider accounting
